name: asmt
description: ASMT packages a spec-before-code, lane-sized AI development workflow for Claude Code and Codex.

interface.longDescription: Apply Fast, Standard, or Deep delivery lanes with OpenSpec, a hard verification gate, living specs, and a review feedback loop.
defaultPrompt: Use ASMT to choose the right delivery lane for this change.
